title: PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam Date 2026

detail.title: PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam Date 2026
detail.short_info: PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam 2026 will be conducted on 31 May 2026. Check PPMET 2026 application form dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, exam pattern, syllabus and how to apply for Punjab B.Sc Nursing admission.

sections.heading: PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam Date 2026

content.text: PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam 2026 will be held on 31 May 2026. Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot, has released the PPMET 2026 application form. Online registration is open from 27 April 2026 to 12 May 2026 for admission to B.Sc. Nursing courses in BFUHS-affiliated colleges.

PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam 2026 will be conducted on 31 May 2026 by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot. The online application form is available from 27 April 2026 to 12 May 2026. This entrance test is conducted for admission to 4-year B.Sc. Nursing programme in government and private nursing colleges affiliated with BFUHS.

Candidates who have passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English can apply. This complete guide covers PPMET 2026 important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, how to apply online, exam pattern, syllabus and counselling process to help aspirants prepare better and successfully apply for Punjab B.Sc Nursing admission.
Direct Link to Open PPMET BSc Nursing Entrance Exam Notification 2026: Click Here

rows: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot
Last Date to Submit Application Form
Last Date to Deposit Application Fee
10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology & English as compulsory subjects
45% marks in PCB (40% for SC/ST/BC categories)
Must have passed 10+2 as a regular student
Punjab domicile preferred for state quota seats

sections.heading: How to Apply for PPMET BSc Nursing 2026?

items: Visit the official website bfuhs.ac.in or the nursing26online main portal
Click on PPMET 2026 B.Sc Nursing Application Form link
Register with basic details and generate login credentials
Fill personal, academic and contact information
Upload scanned photograph, signature and thumb impression
Take printout of the confirmation page

content.text: Duration: 3 Hours (180 Minutes) Type of Questions: Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs) Marking Scheme: +4 marks for each correct answer Negative Marking: No negative marking (but candidates must darken option E for unanswered questions to avoid penalty)
The syllabus is based on 10+2 level of Punjab School Education Board:

items: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
States of Matter: Gases and Liquids
Structural Organization in Animals and Plants
